must_detect.matched_text:
Mr. Kade Morisset (DOB 14/02/1986), Senior Compliance Officer at Paperbark Markets, located in Southbank VIC 3006, uses device A U S - M B P - 1 3 (serial PBK-86-KM), office account pm-kmorisset-02, and work email kade.morisset@paperbark.example for breach-review tasks.
Login traces may record session cookie sid=a39f7c2b-km86 and VPN ticket v p n : 7 1 9 b - k m 8, with EMP-ID K M 8 6 - 1 4 0 2 and profile ref pr=NSW-2023-48A embedded in https://portal.paperbark.example/trace?sid=a39f7c2b-km86&pr=NSW-2023-48A.
Payroll test payments to Mr. Morisset's staff account may appear as BSB 000-777, acct 12 34 56 78, ref "PBK-KM-T1"; these are sandbox artefacts and not valid banking instructions.
Similar quasi-identifiers appear in device inventories (e.g., "Pixel 6a, inner-west Sydney, 29 y/o graduate, BSB 111-222") but, where not linked to a named person or account, such generic demographics are not treated as identifying on their own.
Processing location: Wattle Finch Labs' Gumleaf Cloud "au-south-1" availability zone (Sydney NSW), with failover to "au-east-2" (Brisbane QLD); no data leaves Australia without written instructions and a transfer impact assessment.
Retention workflow: HR and payroll records 7 years from end of employment; device logs 30 days rolling; MNPI workpapers expunged within 2 business days of ASX announcement unless law requires longer.
The parties expressly prohibit ingestion of MNPI outside approved deal rooms and maintain an ASIC-notified insider list; price-sensitive drafts are stored in sealed folders labelled "wall-cross" with access badges logged.
We do not collect Bluetooth or Wi-Fi MAC addresses, IMEIs, or advertising IDs; the string ab:cd:ef:12:34:56 in debug output is not a MAC address and is suppressed at source.
DSAR and correction requests may be sent to dsar@paperbark.example
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
For capital markets data, the parties agree to segregate MNPI as defined in Corporations Act 2001 (Cth) s1042A and ASX Listing Rules; any not generally available information expected to materially affect financial products is ring-fenced and accessed only under wall-cross protocols.
Mr. Kade Morisset (DOB 14/02/1986), Senior Compliance Officer at Paperbark Markets, located in Southbank VIC 3006, uses device A U S - M B P - 1 3 (serial PBK-86-KM), office account pm-kmorisset-02, and work email kade.morisset@paperbark.example for breach-review tasks.
Login traces may record session cookie sid=a39f7c2b-km86 and VPN ticket v p n : 7 1 9 b - k m 8, with EMP-ID K M 8 6 - 1 4 0 2 and profile ref pr=NSW-2023-48A embedded in https://portal.paperbark.example/trace?sid=a39f7c2b-km86&pr=NSW-2023-48A.
Payroll test payments to Mr. Morisset's staff account may appear as BSB 000-777, acct 12 34 56 78, ref "PBK-KM-T1"; these are sandbox artefacts and not valid banking instructions.
Similar quasi-identifiers appear in device inventories (e.g., "Pixel 6a, inner-west Sydney, 29 y/o graduate, BSB 111-222") but, where not linked to a named person or account, such generic demographics are not treated as identifying on their own.
Processing location: Wattle Finch Labs' Gumleaf Cloud "au-south-1" availability zone (Sydney NSW), with failover to "au-east-2" (Brisbane QLD); no data leaves Australia without written instructions and a transfer impact assessment.
Retention workflow: HR and payroll records 7 years from end of employment; device logs 30 days rolling; MNPI workpapers expunged within 2 business days of ASX announcement unless law requires longer.
The parties expressly prohibit ingestion of MNPI outside approved deal rooms and maintain an ASIC-notified insider list; price-sensitive drafts are stored in sealed folders labelled "wall-cross" with access badges logged.
We do not collect Bluetooth or Wi-Fi MAC addresses, IMEIs, or advertising IDs; the string ab:cd:ef:12:34:56 in debug output is not a MAC address and is suppressed at source.
DSAR and correction requests may be sent to dsar@paperbark.example or by post to the Paperbark Markets Privacy Officer, and processor queries to dpo@wattlefinch.test; response target 30 days under the APPs.
Transaction monitoring uses public-source benchmarks (ASX market notices, ASIC registers, and newswires) and deliberately excludes confidential deal inputs unless a signed instruction authorises access.
